title: Admin chat restore on refresh + remote help poll (dbg151)
description:
PipeShare support chat now survives browser refresh for admins as well as customers. On page load, admin tabs call GET /saas/support/chat/active and restore an active session (messages, toolbar, composer, connected state) or a pending invite (waiting-for-accept UI with poll). Previously syncChatSessionState returned immediately for admins and syncAdminChatWaitState required in-memory session id that was lost on reload.

Also ships dbg150: when a customer requests remote help, the assigned admin sees an in-chat Accept/Decline prompt within a few seconds even if the SSE event was missed (3s poll on /saas/support/remote/active).

Who is affected: Horizon admins and customers on the OVH private server using PipeShare support chat. Deploy horizon-backend (chat/active display names + remote/active payload) and client-portal static assets (dbg151). SaaS updates only via releases.html.
changeLog: Fix admin losing support chat on browser refresh — restore from GET /chat/active on init and heartbeat.
Restore pending chat invite waiting state for admin after reload.
chat/active includes customerDisplayName and adminDisplayName for session restore.
Fix admin missing Accept/Decline when customer requests remote help (SSE miss poll recovery).
Admin polls /saas/support/remote/active every 3s for pending customer-initiated remote help.
Screen capture errors surfaced in chat instead of silent failure.
Cache bust dbg151 (portal runtime + PipeShare manifest).
